chatspliter.config.title: ChatSpliter Configuration
chatspliter.filter_group.name: Group Name
chatspliter.tooltip.name: Display name of the filter group
chatspliter.tooltip.keywords: Keywords to match. Any: match any one. All: match all. Regex: regular expression
chatspliter.tooltip.match_mode: Any: match any keyword / All: match all / Regex: regular expression
chatspliter.tooltip.x: Horizontal pixel position of the window top-left corner
chatspliter.tooltip.y: Vertical pixel position of the window top-left corner
chatspliter.tooltip.scale: Overall scale of text and background (1.0 = original size)
chatspliter.tooltip.display_time: Total seconds before a message fully disappears
chatspliter.tooltip.fade_time: Seconds of fade-out effect at the end of display time
chatspliter.tooltip.opacity: Background opacity behind each message line (0 = fully transparent)
chatspliter.tooltip.line_spacing: Extra spacing between message lines in pixels
chatspliter.tooltip.show_timestamp: Show HH:mm:ss timestamp before each message
chatspliter.tooltip.show_title: Show filter group name at top-right of the window
chatspliter.tooltip.max_lines: Maximum message lines kept in memory, oldest discarded when exceeded
chatspliter.tooltip.text_align: Horizontal text alignment: left or right within the window
chatspliter.tooltip.scroll_dir: Bottom Up: vanilla style. Top Down: newest on top. Top Anchored: auto-shift to fill gaps
chatspliter.hint.edit_mode: Open chat to drag HUD edges for resize/reposition
